ns0:entry.ns0:title: Asabeneh/30-Days-Of-Python
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Asabeneh/30-Days-Of-Python
Language: python
The 30 Days of Python programming challenge is a step-by-step guide to learn the Python programming language in 30 days. This challenge may take more than 100 days. Follow your own pace. These videos may help too: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7PNRuno1rzYPb1xLa4yktw

ns0:entry.ns0:title: D4Vinci/Scrapling
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/D4Vinci/Scrapling
Language: python
🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
Language: python
Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBMB/VoxCPM
Language: python
VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TauricResearch/TradingAgents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents
Language: python
TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: python
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: awslabs/aidlc-workflows
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/awslabs/aidlc-workflows
Language: python
AI-Driven Life Cycle (AI-DLC) adaptive workflow steering rules for AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chopratejas/headroom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
Language: python
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: datalab-to/surya
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/datalab-to/surya
Language: python
OCR, layout analysis, reading order, table recognition in 90+ languages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
Language: python
利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/markitdown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown
Language: python
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nesquena/hermes-webui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nesquena/hermes-webui
Language: python
Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zakirkun/deep-eye
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zakirkun/deep-eye
Language: python
Deep Eye orchestrates multiple AI providers (OpenAI, Claude, Grok, Gemini, OLLAMA, Groq, Mistral, OpenRouter, LiteLLM, LM Studio) for intelligent payload generation, scans targets for 45+ vulnerability types, and produces professional reports with compliance mapping.
